mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.artwork_id AS artworkId, c.user_id AS userId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.content, c.create_time AS createTime, c.update_time AS updateTime, u.nickname AS authorName, u.avatar_url AS authorAvatar, pu.nickname AS replyToName FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN comment pc ON c.parent_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON pc.user_id = pu.id WHERE c.artwork_id = #{artworkId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
